name: Aman Deep 90
shortDesc: General maintenance gear oil for lighter gear applications. Reliable lubrication and protection.
description: The Bagani Aman Deep 90 is a general-maintenance gear oil for lighter gear applications. SAE 90 viscosity with GL-4 certification provides reliable lubrication for manual transmissions and gear systems.
description2: Proudly made in the Philippines — Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino!

features.title: Smooth Shifting
features.desc: SAE 90 viscosity ensures smooth, easy gear changes.

features.title: GL-4 Certified
features.desc: Meets GL-4 standards for manual transmissions and gear systems.

features.title: Corrosion Protection
features.desc: Protects gear components from rust and corrosion.

applications: Equipment requiring SAE 90 GL-4 gear oil

faqs.q: Is SAE 90 good for motorcycle gearboxes?
faqs.a: Yes, SAE 90 GL-4 is commonly used in motorcycle gearboxes that have a separate oil system from the engine.

faqs.q: How often should I change gear oil?
faqs.a: Typically every 30,000-50,000 km, but check your vehicle's manual for specific recommendations.

faqs.q: Where can I buy Bagani products?
faqs.a: Bagani oils are available at authorized shops, auto parts stores, and online marketplaces across the Philippines.
